Motion For Reasonable Attorneys Fees
Off Calendar Jun-09-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Hearing on Motion for reasonable attorney's fees.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: M. Goodman, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Stephen Sommers, Esq., and Ashley Baltazar, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff and Moving Party Justin Hinds.
Stephen Dye, Esq., appearing for Defendant and Responding Party Ike's Place, Inc.,

Plaintiff Justin Hinds' Motion for reasonable attorney's fees is heard this day.
After argument of Respective counsel the court ordered Motion for reasonable attorney's fees in the amount of $81,736.88. Court to make no other ruling on any other costs. The Court will resolve all remaining costs on June 17, 2014 at 9:00 am.

Court ordered prevailing party to submit an order for the court's signature.

MINI MINUTES: Appearances, Atty. Ashley Ernst of Sommers Employment Law Group (415-432-4372) appear for plaintiff Justin Hinds and moving party. / Atty Stephen H. Dye of Schnader Attorneys at Law (415-364-6713) appear for defendant Ike's Place, Inc. and opposing party.

Argued - PLAINTIFF JUSTIN HINDS' Motion To Compel Further Responses To Request For Production Of Documents And Special Interrogatories From Defendant And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant And Its Attorney Of Record is taken under submission. Court Rules after hearing plaintiff Justin Hinds' Motion to compel further responses to request for production of documents and special interrogatories from defendant and request for monetary sanctions are denied.
